_comment: Per-backend regression pins. Each entry pins (a) the GGUF under test to a specific HF revision SHA so an upstream re-quantise doesn't silently regress us, and (b) the reference-dump archive in cstr/crispasr-regression-fixtures (also pinned). See tests/regression/README.md.

backends.name: parakeet-tdt-0.6b-ja
backends.source_model_note: HF id passed to NeMo's ASRModel.from_pretrained() by tools/reference_backends/parakeet.py. Only needed for re-bake (Kaggle); the nightly validate path doesn't touch source weights.
backends.expected_transcript: ピッチャーの岡本は1回戦の鳥取城北戦は8回、6対33点リードの場面で3人目でマウンドに上がりました。
backends.expected_transcript_source: captured on commit 3a9b294c (post-issue-#88 fix) with HF revision fd1963a, M1 Metal CPU+BLAS, decode_temperature=0. NOT the human ground-truth from samples/ja/reazon_baseball_14s.srt (which reads 山本 / Yamamoto rather than the model's ピッチャーの岡本 / Okamoto). Lock-in is for regression, not correctness.
backends.diff_thresholds_note: mel_spectrogram is allowed below 0.999 because CrispASR's mel front-end has a known small divergence vs NeMo's preprocessor. encoder_output should always be ≥ 0.999.
